body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'OUR TEAM'.

title.desc: A summary of the team's composition, e.g., 'An international founding team'.

subtitle.desc: Name of a team member, e.g., 'Loc Vuong'.

body_2.desc: Role and location of the team member, e.g., 'FOUNDER & CEO · VIETNAM'.

body_3.desc: Responsibilities of the team member, e.g., 'Drives vision, strategy, and SME and partner relationships.'.

subtitle_2.desc: Name of a team member, e.g., 'Edward Wong'.

body_4.desc: Role and location of the team member, e.g., 'CO-FOUNDER & CTO · USA'.

body_5.desc: Responsibilities of the team member, e.g., 'Leads platform, data, and AI-driven underwriting engineering'.

subtitle_3.desc: Name of a team member, e.g., 'Dr. Huy Pham'.

body_7.desc: Role and location of the team member, e.g., 'CO-FOUNDER & CFO · AUSTRALIA'.

body_8.desc: Responsibilities of the team member, e.g., 'Leads financial strategy, modeling, and investor discipline.'.

body_9.desc: Additional support or advisory roles, e.g., 'Supported by advisors across fundraising, regulatory, and fi'.
